name: TARGET_COMBINATIONS_BY_ORIGIN_TECHCLASS1
description: Target combinations by origin TechnologyClass1 category. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]->(tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair, collect(DISTINCT a.name)[0..5] AS assignees, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: For patents from China in the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category, what target-pair combinations are covered?
For patents from US in the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category, what target-pair combinations are involved?
For patents from EU in the Other functional combination TechnologyClass1 category, which target-pair combinations appear?
